notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics (part of Clariant) is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market. Their lipid-based delivery systems enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives into the scalp and hair follicle, making them a strategic partner for premium anti-hair loss formulations.

Lucas Meyer Cosmetics, part of Clariant, is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a key distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market — a biomimetic peptide combined with red clover extract rich in biochanin A for comprehensive anti-hair loss support. Their lipid-based delivery systems are specifically engineered to enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives deep into the scalp and hair follicle. A go-to partner for formulators seeking clinically-backed, COSMOS-certified anti-hair loss and scalp health solutions.
